title: Sony's decision to ditch discs was practically inevitable, data shows
summary: The ceiling for physical PlayStation game sales isn’t all that impressive these days either; Piscatella shared that the top-selling physical PlayStation game has only sold a paltry 275,000 units in the US so far this year.
caption: output/2026-07-23/sony-s-decision-to-ditch-discs-was-practically-inevitable-data-shows.txt
